    have hx_pos : 0 < x := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hx0
    have h_lt : x < a := by
      have : (x : ℤ) * a = b^2 - k := by zify [heq]; simp [x_z, hx]; ring
      have : (x : ℤ) * a < b^2 := by have : (k : ℤ) ≥ 1 := by zify [k_pos]; linarith; linarith
      have : (x : ℤ) * a < b * a := lt_of_lt_of_le this (by apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (Int.ofNat_le_ofNat_of_le h_le) (Int.ofNat_nonneg a))
      zify at this; rwa [mul_lt_mul_right (by zify [ha]; linarith)] at this
    have h_in : x + b ∈ S := ⟨x, b, rfl, hx_pos, hb, by zify [h_sol]; assumption_mod_cast⟩
    exact Nat.find_min_not hS (lt_add_of_lt_add_right b h_lt) h_in

let k := (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1)
  have hk : (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 : ℤ) = k * (a * b + 1) := by zify; apply Nat.div_eq_of_dvd h₁
  have k_pos : 0 < k := Nat.div_pos (Nat.le_of_dvd (by positivity) h₁) (by positivity)
  let S : Set ℕ := { n | ∃ x y : ℕ, 0 < x ∧ 0 < y ∧ (x : ℤ) ^ 2 + (y : ℤ) ^ 2 = k * ((x : ℤ) * y + 1) ∧ x + y = n }
  have h_ne : S.Nonempty := ⟨a + b, a, b, h₀.1, h₀.2, hk, rfl⟩
  let n := sInf S
  have hn : n ∈ S := Nat.sInf_mem h_ne
  rcases hn with ⟨x, y, hx, hy, hxy, hsum⟩
  wlog h_le : y ≤ x generalizing x y
  · refine this y x hy hx ?_ (by rwa [add_comm]) (le_of_not_le h_le)
    rw [add_comm, mul_comm y] at hxy; exact hxy
  let c : ℤ := k * y - x
  have h_quad : c * x = (y : ℤ) ^ 2 - k := by
    rw [sub_eq_iff_eq_add, mul_comm, ← sub_eq_iff_eq_add']; apply eq_sub_of_add_eq; rw [← hxy]; ring
  have h_sol_c : c ^ 2 + (y : ℤ) ^ 2 = k * (c * y + 1) := by
    rw [← sub_eq_zero]; convert sub_eq_zero.mpr hxy using 1; simp [c]; ring
  have c_ge_0 : 0 ≤ c := by
    by_contra! h_neg
    have : 0 < c^2 + (y : ℤ)^2 - k * (c * y + 1) := by
      rw [sub_pos, mul_add]
      have : k * c * y ≤ -k := by
         have : c * y ≤ -1 := mul_le_of_le_one_left (by zify; exact hy.le) h_neg
         apply le_trans (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left this (by zify; exact k_pos.le)); simp
      apply lt_of_le_of_lt (add_le_add_right this k); rw [add_comm (-k), ← sub_eq_add_neg, sub_lt_iff_lt_add]
      calc k < 1 + k + y^2 := by linarith [sq_nonneg (y:ℤ), (by zify; exact k_pos : (0:ℤ) < k)]
           _ ≤ c^2 + y^2 + k := by apply add_le_add_right; apply add_le_add_right; apply sq_pos_of_neg h_neg
    rw [h_sol_c] at this; exact lt_irrefl 0 this
  have c_eq_0 : c = 0 := by
    by_contra h_nz
    let c_nat := c.toNat
    have c_def : c = c_nat := Int.toNat_of_nonneg c_ge_0
    have c_pos : 0 < c_nat := by rwa [← Int.ofNat_pos, ← c_def, lt_iff_le_and_ne]
    have h_sol : c_nat + y ∈ S := ⟨c_nat, y, c_pos, hy, by zify; rwa [← c_def], rfl⟩
    apply not_le_of_lt (m := n) (b := c_nat + y) ?_ (Nat.sInf_le h_sol)
    rw [← hsum, ← Int.ofNat_lt, Int.ofNat_add, Int.ofNat_add, ← c_def, lt_iff_le_and_ne]
    constructor
    . have : c * x < y * x := by
        rw [h_quad]; apply lt_of_lt_of_le (sub_lt_self _ (by zify; exact k_pos))
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right h_le (by zify; exact hy.le)
      exact le_of_lt (lt_of_mul_lt_mul_right this (by zify; exact hx.le))
    . intro h_eq; rw [h_eq] at h_quad
      have : (x:ℤ)^2 < y^2 := by rw [h_quad]; linarith
      have : x < y := by apply Int.lt_of_sq_lt_sq this (by zify; exact hx.le)
      linarith
  exists y; rw [eq_comm]; apply (div_eq_iff_mul_eq (by positivity)).mpr; norm_cast
  rw [← h_quad, c_eq_0, zero_mul, zero_eq_sub_iff_eq]

let k := (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1)
  have hk : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (a * b + 1) := Nat.div_eq_of_dvd h₁
  have hk_pos : 0 < k := Nat.div_pos (Nat.le_of_dvd (by nlinarith) h₁) (by nlinarith)
  let S := { n | ∃ a b, a + b = n ∧ 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∧ a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (a * b + 1) }
  have h_ex : a + b ∈ S := ⟨a, b, rfl, h₀.1, h₀.2, hk⟩
  obtain ⟨A, B, hAn, hA, hB, hEQ, hAB⟩ : ∃ A B, A + B = Nat.find h_ex ∧ 0 < A ∧ 0 < B ∧ A ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = k * (A * B + 1) ∧ B ≤ A := by
    rcases Nat.find_spec h_ex with ⟨A, B, hAn, hA, hB, hEQ⟩
    by_cases h : B ≤ A
    · exact ⟨A, B, hAn, hA, hB, hEQ, h⟩
    · exact ⟨B, A, by rwa [add_comm], hB, hA, by rwa [add_comm, mul_comm], le_of_not_le h⟩
  have h_eq_z : (A : ℤ) ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = k * (A * B + 1) := by zify [hEQ]
  let C : ℤ := k * B - A
  have h_root : C ^ 2 - k * B * C + B ^ 2 - k = 0 := by
    rw [show C = (k : ℤ) * B - A from rfl]; linear_combination -1 * h_eq_z
  have hC_ge_0 : 0 ≤ C := by
    by_contra! hC
    have : C^2 + B^2 + k * (B * (-C) - 1) = 0 := by linear_combination h_root
    have : C^2 + B^2 + k * (B * (-C) - 1) > 0 := by
      have : B * (-C) ≥ 1 := by zify [hB]; nlinarith
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg C, sq_nonneg (B:ℤ), hk_pos]
    linarith
  lift C to ℕ using hC_ge_0
  have hC0 : C = 0 := by
    by_contra hC_pos
    have hC_pos : 0 < C := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hC_pos
    have h_vieta : (C : ℤ) * A = B ^ 2 - k := by rw [show (C : ℤ) = k * B - A from rfl]; linear_combination -1 * h_eq_z
    have hCA : C < A := by
      have : (C : ℤ) * A < A * A := by
        calc
          _ = (B : ℤ) ^ 2 - k := h_vieta
          _ < B ^ 2 := by linarith [hk_pos]
          _ ≤ A ^ 2 := by zify; exact sq_le_sq' (by linarith) (by linarith)
      exact (mul_lt_mul_right (by zify [hA]; linarith)).mp this
    refine Nat.find_min' h_ex ?_ (by linarith [hAn])
    exact ⟨B, C, rfl, hB, hC_pos, by zify; rw [add_comm, mul_comm]; linear_combination h_root⟩
  use B
  rw [show k = B ^ 2 from by zify at h_root hC0; rw [hC0] at h_root; linear_combination -1 * h_root] at hk ⊢
  rw [hk]; simp; field_simp; nlinarith

let k := (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1)
  have hk : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (a * b + 1) := Nat.div_eq_of_dvd h₁
  have h_sq : ∃ x, k = x ^ 2 := by
    by_contra h_not_sq
    let S := { p : ℕ × ℕ | 0 < p.1 ∧ 0 < p.2 ∧ p.1 ^ 2 + p.2 ^ 2 = k * (p.1 * p.2 + 1) }
    have h_wf : WellFounded (invImage (fun p : ℕ × ℕ => p.1 + p.2) instLTNat.lt.wf) :=
      invImage_wf _ Nat.lt_wfRel.wf
    have ⟨⟨a, b⟩, ⟨ha, hb, heq⟩, hmin⟩ := h_wf.has_min S ⟨(a, b), h₀.1, h₀.2, hk⟩
    wlog h_le : b ≤ a generalizing a b
    · exact this b a ⟨hb, ha, by rwa [add_comm (b^2), mul_comm b, add_comm (b*a)]⟩
        (fun p hp hlt => hmin p.swap hp (by rwa [add_comm] at hlt)) (le_of_not_le h_le)
    let c : ℤ := k * b - a
    have hc_eq : c ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (c * b + 1) := by zify at heq ⊢; nlinarith
    have hc_pos : 0 < c := by
      by_contra hc; rw [not_lt] at hc
      have : k = b ^ 2 := by
        have : c < 0 → c * b + 1 ≤ 0 := by intro; nlinarith
        nlinarith
      exact h_not_sq ⟨b, by zify at this; exact this.symm⟩
    lift c to ℕ using hc_pos.le
    have hc_lt : c < a := by
      have : (a : ℤ) * c = b ^ 2 - k := by zify at heq; nlinarith
      have : (k : ℤ) > 0 := by zify at heq; nlinarith
      zify; nlinarith
    refine hmin (c, b) ⟨by exact_mod_cast hc_pos, hb, by exact_mod_cast hc_eq⟩ (add_lt_add_right hc_lt b)
  obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := h_sq
  use x; norm_cast; rw [hk, mul_div_cancel_left]; positivity

let k := (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1)
  have hk : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (a * b + 1) := Nat.div_eq_of_dvd h₁
  have hk₀ : 0 < k := by nlinarith [h₀.1, h₀.2]
  suffices ∃ x, x ^ 2 = k by
    obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := this
    use x; rw [← Nat.cast_pow, hk, mul_div_cancel_right₀]; norm_cast; nlinarith
  induction a + b using Nat.strong_induction_on generalizing a b with | h s ih =>
  by_cases hba : b ≤ a
  · let c : ℤ := ↑k * ↑b - ↑a
    have hc_eq : c ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (c * b + 1) := by
      have : (a:ℤ)^2 + b^2 = k * (a * b + 1) := by exact_mod_cast hk
      simp [c]; nlinarith
    by_cases hc₀ : c = 0
    · use b; rw [← hc₀] at hc_eq; simp at hc_eq; exact_mod_cast hc_eq.symm
    · have hc_pos : 0 < c := by
        by_contra hneg; push_neg at hneg
        have : c * b + 1 ≤ 0 := by nlinarith [hneg, h₀.2]
        nlinarith [hk₀, sq_nonneg c, sq_nonneg (b:ℤ)]
      lift c to ℕ using hc_pos.le
      have hca : c < a := by
        apply lt_of_mul_lt_mul_right (b := (a:ℤ))
        · have : c * a = (b:ℤ)^2 - k := by
            have : (a:ℤ)^2 + b^2 = k * (a * b + 1) := by exact_mod_cast hk
            simp [c]; nlinarith
          rw [this]
          apply lt_of_sub_lt_self
          exact Int.cast_pos.mpr hk₀
        · exact Int.cast_nonneg h₀.1
      refine ih (c + b) (add_lt_add_right hca b) c b rfl (Int.natCast_pos.mp hc_pos) h₀.2 ?_
      exact_mod_cast hc_eq
  · rw [add_comm] at ih
    exact ih b a (add_comm a b) h₀.2 h₀.1 (by rwa [add_comm, mul_comm]) (le_of_lt (not_le.mp hba))

let k := (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1)
  have hk : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (a * b + 1) := Nat.div_eq_of_dvd h₁
  have k_pos : 0 < k := by
    rw [← hk]
    exact Nat.add_pos_left (Nat.pow_pos h₀.1 2) _
  use k.sqrt
  rw [Nat.cast_pow, ← Nat.cast_add, hk, Nat.cast_mul, mul_div_cancel_right₀]
  · rw [eq_comm, ← Nat.cast_pow, Nat.cast_inj]
    by_contra h_not_sq
    let S := {p : ℕ × ℕ | 0 < p.1 ∧ 0 < p.2 ∧ p.1 ^ 2 + p.2 ^ 2 = k * (p.1 * p.2 + 1)}
    have h_nonempty : (a, b) ∈ S := ⟨h₀.1, h₀.2, hk⟩
    let sums := (fun p : ℕ × ℕ => p.1 + p.2) '' S
    have h_sums_ne : sums.Nonempty := ⟨a + b, a, b, h_nonempty, rfl⟩
    let min_sum := Nat.find h_sums_ne
    have h_min_sum_mem : min_sum ∈ sums := Nat.find_spec h_sums_ne
    rcases h_min_sum_mem with ⟨⟨A, B⟩, h_in_S, h_sum_eq⟩
    rcases h_in_S with ⟨hA, hB, h_eq⟩
    wlog hAB : B ≤ A generalizing A B
    · exact this B A hB hA (by rwa [add_comm, mul_comm]) (by rwa [add_comm]) h_sum_eq (le_of_not_le hAB)
    have h_eq_AB : A ≠ B := by
      intro h
      subst h
      have : A ^ 2 + 1 ∣ 2 * A ^ 2 := by rw [← h_eq, two_mul]; exact Nat.dvd_add_self_left.2 (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ _)
      have : A ^ 2 + 1 ∣ 2 := by
         convert Nat.dvd_sub (le_of_lt (by nlinarith [Nat.one_le_pow 2 A hA])) (Nat.dvd_mul_left (A ^ 2 + 1) 2) this
         ring
      have : A ^ 2 + 1 ≤ 2 := Nat.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) this
      have : A = 1 := by nlinarith [Nat.one_le_pow 2 A hA]
      rw [this] at h_eq
      norm_num at h_eq
      rw [h_eq] at h_not_sq
      exact h_not_sq Nat.isSquare_one
    have hAB_strict : B < A := lt_of_le_of_ne hAB (Ne.symm h_eq_AB)
    let x_int : ℤ := (k : ℤ) * B - A
    have h_quad : x_int ^ 2 - (k : ℤ) * B * x_int + B ^ 2 - k = 0 := by
      zify at h_eq
      linear_combination h_eq
    have h_x_pos_int : x_int > 0 := by
      by_contra! h
      have : x_int ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = (k : ℤ) * (x_int * B + 1) := by linear_combination h_quad
      have : (k : ℤ) * (x_int * B + 1) ≤ 0 := by
        apply mul_nonpos_of_nonneg_of_nonpos (Int.ofNat_nonneg _)
        have : x_int ≤ 0 := h
        by_cases hz : x_int = 0
        · rw [hz]; norm_num
        · have : x_int ≤ -1 := by rwa [Int.lt_add_one_iff, zero_add] at h
          nlinarith [Int.one_le_ofNat hB]
      have : x_int ^ 2 + B ^ 2 > 0 := add_pos_of_nonneg_of_pos (sq_nonneg _) (sq_pos_of_ne_zero (Int.ofNat_ne_zero.2 (ne_of_gt hB)))
      linarith
    lift x_int to ℕ using (le_of_lt h_x_pos_int) with x hx
    have hx_pos : 0 < x := Int.ofNat_pos.1 h_x_pos_int
    have h_root_nat : x ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = k * (x * B + 1) := by zify; exact h_quad.symm ▸ (by ring)
    have h_x_lt_A : x < A := by
      have : (x : ℤ) * A = B ^ 2 - k := by zify at h_eq; linear_combination h_eq
      have : (k : ℤ) < B ^ 2 := by
        by_contra! h
        have : (x : ℤ) * A ≤ 0 := by linarith
        have : (x : ℤ) * A > 0 := mul_pos h_x_pos_int (Int.ofNat_pos.2 hA)
        linarith
      have : (x : ℤ) < A := by
        apply Int.lt_of_mul_lt_mul_right _ (Int.ofNat_nonneg (le_of_lt hA))
        rw [this]
        apply lt_of_lt_of_le (sub_lt_self _ (Int.ofNat_pos.2 k_pos))
        zify
        nlinarith
      exact Int.ofNat_lt.1 this
    have h_sol : (x, B) ∈ S := ⟨hx_pos, hB, h_root_nat⟩
    have h_sum_lt : x + B < A + B := by linarith
    have h_min_violation : x + B < min_sum := h_sum_eq ▸ h_sum_lt
    exact Nat.find_min h_sums_ne h_min_violation ⟨(x, B), h_sol, rfl⟩
  · exact mod_cast (Nat.ne_of_gt (Nat.succ_le_iff.2 (Nat.mul_pos h₀.1 h₀.2)))

obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := h₁
  rw [hk, mul_div_cancel_left _ (by positivity)]
  have : ∃ x : ℕ, x ^ 2 = k := by
    let S := { n | ∃ a b, a + b = n ∧ 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∧ a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (a * b + 1) }
    have h_start : a + b ∈ S := ⟨a, b, rfl, h₀.1, h₀.2, hk⟩
    revert h_start
    generalize h_n : a + b = n
    intro h_mem
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n IH =>
      rcases h_mem with ⟨a, b, rfl, ha, hb, heq⟩
      wlog h_le : b ≤ a generalizing a b
      · exact this b a (add_comm a b) hb ha (by rwa [add_comm, mul_comm b]) (le_of_not_le h_le)
      let C : ℤ := k * b - a
      have h_root : C ^ 2 - k * b * C + b ^ 2 - k = 0 := by zify [heq]; ring
      have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ C := by
        by_contra h_neg
        have : C ≤ -1 := by linarith
        have : (1:ℤ) ≤ b := by zify [hb]; exact Nat.le_add_left 1 (b - 1)
        have : (1:ℤ) ≤ k := by 
          zify; apply Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_right (0 < a^2+b^2) (Nat.zero_le _)
          rw [← heq]; positivity
        have : C^2 + b^2 + k * (-b * C - 1) = 0 := by linear_combination h_root
        nlinarith
      lift C to ℕ using h_nonneg
      by_cases hC : C = 0
      · use b; zify at h_root; rw [hC] at h_root; linarith
      · have hC_pos : 0 < C := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hC
        have h_sol : C ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (C * b + 1) := by zify at h_root ⊢; linarith
        have h_lt : C + b < a + b := by
          zify
          have : (a:ℤ) * C = b^2 - k := by zify [heq]; ring
          have : (a:ℤ) * C < a^2 := by
            apply lt_of_lt_of_le (b := (b:ℤ)^2)
            · linarith [Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_right (by rw [← heq]; positivity) (Nat.zero_le _) : 0 < k]
            · zify [h_le]; nlinarith
          zify at this; nlinarith
        exact IH (C + b) h_lt ⟨C, b, rfl, hC_pos, hb, h_sol⟩
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := this
  exact ⟨x, by norm_cast; rw [hx]⟩

let k := (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1)
  have hk : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (a * b + 1) := (Nat.div_mul_cancel h₁).symm
  have h_sq : ∃ x, x ^ 2 = k := by
    classical
    by_contra h_not_sq
    let S := { n | ∃ A B, A + B = n ∧ 0 < A ∧ 0 < B ∧ A ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = k * (A * B + 1) }
    have h_nonempty : a + b ∈ S := ⟨a, b, rfl, h₀.1, h₀.2, hk⟩
    let n := Nat.find h_nonempty
    obtain ⟨A, B, h_sum, hA, hB, h_eq, hAB⟩ : ∃ A B, A + B = n ∧ 0 < A ∧ 0 < B ∧ A ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = k * (A * B + 1) ∧ B ≤ A := by
      rcases Nat.find_spec h_nonempty with ⟨A, B, h_sum, hA, hB, h_eq⟩
      by_cases h : B ≤ A
      · exact ⟨A, B, h_sum, hA, hB, h_eq, h⟩
      · push_neg at h; exact ⟨B, A, by rwa [add_comm], hB, hA, by rwa [add_comm B, mul_comm B, add_comm (B^2)], le_of_lt h⟩

    let x_int : ℤ := k * B - A
    have h_quad : x_int ^ 2 - k * B * x_int + B ^ 2 - k = 0 := by
      have h_eq_int : (A : ℤ) ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = k * (A * B + 1) := by zify [h_eq]
      have h_sub : x_int = (k : ℤ) * B - A := rfl
      rw [h_sub]; ring_nf; rw [h_eq_int]; ring

    have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ x_int := by
      by_contra h_neg; push_neg at h_neg
      let y := -x_int
      have hy : 0 < y := neg_pos.2 h_neg
      have h_quad_y : y ^ 2 + k * B * y + B ^ 2 - k = 0 := by
        rw [← neg_neg y, neg_sq] at h_quad; simp [neg_mul_neg] at h_quad
        have : x_int = -y := by simp
        rw [this] at h_quad; ring_nf at h_quad ⊢; exact h_quad
      have k_pos : 1 ≤ k := by
        rw [Nat.one_le_div_iff (by positivity)]
        nlinarith [Nat.mul_le_mul_left 1 hB]
      have : (k : ℤ) * (B * y - 1) + y ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = 0 := by linear_combination h_quad_y
      have : (k : ℤ) * (B * y - 1) ≥ 0 := by
        apply mul_nonneg (Int.ofNat_nonneg _)
        have : (B : ℤ) * y ≥ 1 * 1 := mul_le_mul (Int.ofNat_le.2 (Nat.one_le_of_lt hB)) (Int.add_one_le_iff.2 hy) zero_le_one (Int.ofNat_nonneg _)
        linarith
      have : y ^ 2 + B ^ 2 > 0 := add_pos_of_pos_of_nonneg (pow_pos hy 2) (sq_nonneg _)
      nlinarith

    lift x_int to ℕ using h_nonneg with x hx
    rw [hx] at h_quad
    
    by_cases hx0 : x = 0
    · rw [hx0] at h_quad; simp at h_quad; rw [sub_eq_zero] at h_quad
      apply h_not_sq; exists B; exact h_quad.symm
    
    · have hx_pos : 0 < x := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hx0
      have h_new_sol : x ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = k * (x * B + 1) := by
        zify; push_cast; rw [← hx]; ring_nf at h_quad ⊢
        rw [sub_eq_zero] at h_quad; rw [h_quad]; ring
      
      have h_small : x < A := by
        have : (x : ℤ) * A = B ^ 2 - k := by
          rw [← hx]; ring_nf; rw [sub_eq_iff_eq_add]
          have : x_int + A = k * B := by rw [sub_add_cancel]
          rw [this]; ring_nf; rw [h_quad]; ring

    let S := { s | ∃ A B, A + B = s ∧ 0 < A ∧ 0 < B ∧ A^2 + B^2 = k * (A * B + 1) }
    have h_ex : a + b ∈ S := ⟨a, b, rfl, h₀.1, h₀.2, hk⟩

    rcases hs with ⟨A, B, hsum, hA, hB, hqn⟩
    have h_swap : ∃ A B, A + B = s ∧ 0 < A ∧ 0 < B ∧ B ≤ A ∧ A^2 + B^2 = k * (A * B + 1) := by
      rcases le_total B A with h | h
      · exact ⟨A, B, hsum, hA, hB, h, hqn⟩
      · exact ⟨B, A, by rwa [add_comm], hB, hA, h, by rwa [add_comm, mul_comm]⟩

      zify [hqn] at *; linear_combination -1 * hqn
    have h_val : x * A = B^2 - k := by
      zify [hqn] at *; linear_combination hqn
    have x_ge_0 : 0 ≤ x := by
      by_contra h; push_neg at h
      have : k * B < A := by zify at *; linarith
      have : k > B^2 + A := by
        have : B^2 - k ≤ -A := by zify at *; nlinarith [h]
        linarith

        calc (A^2 + B^2 : ℤ) < (B^2 + A) * (A * B + 1) := by nlinarith [hA, hB]

    by_cases hx : x = 0

    · have x_pos : 0 < x := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hx
      have x_lt : x < A := by
        have : (x : ℤ) * A < A^2 := by
           rw [h_val]

      have : x + B ∈ S := ⟨x, B, rfl, x_pos, hB, h_new_sol⟩
      have : x + B < s := by rw [← hsum]; linarith
      have := Nat.not_mem_of_lt_sInf this
      contradiction
  rcases this with ⟨x, rfl⟩
  use x; norm_cast

let k := (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1)
  have hk : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (a * b + 1) := Nat.div_eq_of_dvd h₁
  have h_sq : IsSquare k := by
    let S := { n | ∃ A B, A + B = n ∧ 0 < A ∧ 0 < B ∧ A ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = k * (A * B + 1) }
    have h_ex : a + b ∈ S := ⟨a, b, rfl, h₀.1, h₀.2, hk⟩
    let n := Nat.find h_ex
    have h_min : n ∈ S := Nat.find_spec h_ex

    · specialize this B A (by linarith) hB hA (by rwa [add_comm, mul_comm B, add_comm (B^2)])
      exact this

    have h_quad : x_z ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = k * (x_z * B + 1) := by
      apply Int.eq_of_sub_eq_zero
      simp only [x_z]
      zify at h_eq
      linear_combination -1 * h_eq

      by_contra h_neg
      have : x_z ≤ -1 := by linarith
      have h_bound : x_z * (A * B + 1) ≤ -1 * (A * B + 1) := by 
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right this; linarith

        simp [x_z]; zify at h_eq; linear_combination B * h_eq

      zify at hA hB; nlinarith

    by_cases h_x0 : x = 0
    · subst x; simp at h_quad; zify at h_quad

      use B; exact this

      have h_x_lt : x < A := by
         have h_k_pos : 0 < k := by
           by_contra h; simp [h] at h_eq; linarith
         zify at hA hB h_eq h_x_pos ⊢; simp [x_z]
         have h_x_eq : A * x = B^2 - k := by simp [x_z]; linear_combination -1 * h_eq
         have : A * x < A * B := by
           rw [h_x_eq]; calc
             B^2 - k < B^2 := by linarith
             _ ≤ B * A := by nlinarith
             _ = A * B := mul_comm B A
         linarith
      have : x + B ∈ S := ⟨x, B, rfl, h_x_pos, hB, h_quad⟩
      have : x + B < n := by rw [hAB]; linarith
      refine (Nat.find_min h_ex this) ‹x + B ∈ S›

  use y
  rw [Nat.cast_pow, hk, mul_div_cancel_right₀]
  · rw [hy]; norm_cast
  · linarith

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb⟩
  let k := (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1)
  have hk : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (a * b + 1) := Nat.div_eq_of_dvd h₁
  have k_pos : 0 < k := Nat.div_pos (Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.add_pos_left (Nat.pow_pos ha 2) _) h₁) (Nat.succ_pos _)

    · exact this b a (by rwa [add_comm]) hb ha (by rwa [add_comm, mul_comm, add_comm (b^2)]) (le_of_not_le h_ab)

      norm_cast at hc ⊢; exact hc

  rw [hx, ← Nat.cast_pow, hk, mul_div_cancel_right₀]
  · simp
  · norm_cast; linarith

      intro hc; rw [hc, mul_zero, sub_eq_zero] at h_root
      exact h B (by rw [← h_root]; norm_cast; rw [hk]; norm_cast; exact mul_div_cancel_right _ (by positivity))

    zify; apply lt_of_mul_lt_mul_left _ (Int.ofNat_nonneg hA)
    rw [h_root]; apply lt_of_le_of_lt (sub_le_self _ (Int.ofNat_nonneg k))
    rw [sq_lt_sq]; linarith; linarith

let k := (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1)

  have hk_pos : 0 < k := by
    apply Nat.div_pos _ (by positivity)
    calc a * b + 1 ≤ 2 * a * b := by nlinarith [h₀.1, h₀.2]
      _ ≤ a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 := by nlinarith

    rcases this with ⟨x, hx⟩; use x; rw [hx, hk, mul_comm, Nat.mul_div_cancel _ (by positivity)]; norm_cast
  by_contra h_not_sq
  let S := {n | ∃ x y, x + y = n ∧ 0 < x ∧ 0 < y ∧ x ^ 2 + y ^ 2 = k * (x * y + 1)}
  have h_nonempty : a + b ∈ S := ⟨a, b, rfl, h₀.1, h₀.2, hk⟩
  let n := Nat.find h_nonempty
  have hn : n ∈ S := Nat.find_spec h_nonempty
  rcases hn with ⟨x, y, hsum, hx, hy, heq⟩
  let A := min x y; let B := max x y
  have hA : 0 < A := lt_min hx hy
  have hB : 0 < B := lt_max_of_lt_left hx
  have h_le : A ≤ B := min_le_max

  have h_sum : A + B = n := by rw [← hsum]; cases le_total x y <;> simp_all [A, B, add_comm]
  let C_z : ℤ := k * A - B
  have h_quad : (B : ℤ) ^ 2 - k * A * B + A ^ 2 - k = 0 := by zify at h_eq ⊢; linear_combination h_eq
  have hC_prod : (B : ℤ) * C_z = A ^ 2 - k := by zify; linear_combination h_quad
  have hC_pos : 0 ≤ C_z := by
    by_contra h_neg
    have : C_z ≤ -1 := by linarith
    have : C_z ^ 2 - k * A * C_z + A ^ 2 - k = 0 := by
      have : (A : ℤ) ^ 2 + C_z ^ 2 = k * (A * C_z + 1) := by zify; nlinarith [h_quad]
      linear_combination this
    have : -A * C_z - 1 ≥ 0 := by have : -C_z ≥ 1 := by linarith; have : (A : ℤ) ≥ 1 := by zify; exact hA; nlinarith
    have : (k : ℤ) > 0 := by zify; exact hk_pos
    nlinarith

  by_cases hC0 : C = 0
  · have : k = A ^ 2 := by subst hC0; zify at hC_prod; simp at hC_prod; linarith
    exact h_not_sq ⟨A, this.symm⟩
  · have hC_pos' : 0 < C := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hC0
    have hC_lt : C < B := by
      have : (B : ℤ) * C < B * B := by
        rw [hC_prod]; zify
        calc (A : ℤ) ^ 2 - k < A ^ 2 := Int.sub_lt_self _ (by zify; exact hk_pos)
          _ ≤ B ^ 2 := by zify at h_le; nlinarith
      zify at this; exact (mul_lt_mul_left hB).mp this
    have h_next : A + C ∈ S := ⟨A, C, rfl, hA, hC_pos', by zify; nlinarith [h_quad]⟩
    exact Nat.find_min h_nonempty (by rw [← h_sum]; exact add_lt_add_left hC_lt A) h_next

let k := (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1)

  have hk0 : 0 < k := by
    rw [Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero]; intro z; rw [z, zero_mul] at hk
    linarith [pow_pos h₀.1 2, pow_pos h₀.2 2]
  suffices ∃ x, x ^ 2 = k by
    obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := this; use x; rw [← Nat.cast_pow, hk]; field_simp
  generalize hs : a + b = s
  induction s using Nat.strong_induction_on generalizing a b with
  | h s ih =>
    if hab : a = b then
      subst hab
      have : a = 1 := by
        have : a ^ 2 + 1 ∣ 2 * a ^ 2 := by rw [← hk]; ring
        have : a ^ 2 + 1 ∣ 2 := (Nat.dvd_add_right (dvd_mul_right _ _)).mp (by simpa using this)
        nlinarith [Nat.le_of_dvd zero_lt_two this]
      subst this; use 1; simp [k]; rfl
    else
      wlog hba : b < a generalizing a b
      · cases Nat.lt_trichotomy b a
        · exact hba a b h₀ h₁ hk rfl hab ‹_›
        · contradiction
        · rw [add_comm] at hs; exact this b a ⟨h₀.2, h₀.1⟩ (by rwa [add_comm, mul_comm]) (by rwa [add_comm, mul_comm]) hs (Ne.symm hab) ‹_›
      let c : ℤ := k * b - a

        have : (a:ℤ)^2 + b^2 - k * (a*b+1) = 0 := by exact_mod_cast sub_eq_zero.mpr hk
        ring_nf; linear_combination -1 * this

        rw [mul_sub, mul_comm (a:ℤ), mul_assoc, ← mul_add, ← hk]; ring
      have hck : k ≤ b ^ 2 := by
        by_contra! h
        have : c < 0 := neg_of_mul_neg_left (by rw [hca]; linarith) (by exact_mod_cast h₀.1)
        have : c * b + 1 < 0 := by
          have : c ≤ -1 := by linarith
          have : b ≥ 1 := by exact_mod_cast h₀.2
          linarith
        have : c^2 + b^2 = k * (c * b + 1) := by linear_combination h_quad
        have : c^2 + b^2 > 0 := by nlinarith
        have : k * (c * b + 1) < 0 := by nlinarith
        linarith
      if hkb : k = b ^ 2 then
        use b; exact_mod_cast hkb.symm
      else
        have hc_pos : 0 < c := pos_of_mul_pos_right (by rw [hca]; exact sub_pos.mpr (lt_of_le_of_ne hck hkb)) (by exact_mod_cast (le_of_lt h₀.1))
        lift c to ℕ using (le_of_lt hc_pos)
        apply ih (c + b) ?_ c b ⟨by exact_mod_cast hc_pos, h₀.2⟩ ?_ ?_ rfl
        · apply add_lt_add_right
          rw [← Int.ofNat_lt]; apply Int.lt_of_mul_lt_mul_left (a:=a) (by exact_mod_cast h₀.1)
          rw [hca, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_mul]; norm_cast
          calc b^2 - k < b^2 := Nat.sub_lt_self hk0 (lt_of_le_of_ne hck hkb)
               _ < a * a := pow_lt_pow_left hba (by norm_num)
        · rw [mul_comm c, add_comm c]; apply Nat.dvd_of_mul_dvd_mul_left (k := k) (by positivity)
          rw [← hk]; exact_mod_cast (eq_sub_of_add_eq h_quad).symm
        · rw [← hk]; exact_mod_cast (eq_sub_of_add_eq h_quad).symm

    by_contra h_not_sq

        nlinarith
      have : C^2 + B^2 ≤ 0 := by
        have : C^2 + B^2 = k * (C * B + 1) := by linear_combination hC_root
        nlinarith [hk_pos]
      nlinarith [hB]
    lift C to ℕ using hC_pos
    have hC_lt : C < A := by
      have : (C : ℤ) * A = B ^ 2 - k := by
        simp only [C]; have : (A : ℤ) ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = k * (A * B + 1) := by zify; exact heq
        linear_combination this
      have : (C : ℤ) < A := by
        cases lt_or_le k (B^2) with
        | inl hk_lt =>
          apply lt_of_mul_lt_mul_right (a := A) (b := B)
          · rw [this]; zify; nlinarith
          · zify; linarith
        | inr hk_le =>
          have : (C : ℤ) * A ≤ 0 := by linarith
          have : (C : ℤ) ≤ 0 := nonpos_of_mul_nonpos_right this (by zify; linarith)
          linarith
      exact Int.ofNat_lt.mp this
    have hC_sq : C ^ 2 = k := by
      by_contra h_neq
      have hC_pos' : 0 < C := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (λ h => by simp [h] at h_neq; exact h_neq rfl)
      have : P (C + B) := ⟨C, B, hC_pos', hB, by zify; linear_combination hC_root, rfl⟩
      have : n ≤ C + B := Nat.find_min' (Classical.decPred P) hP this
      linarith
    exact h_not_sq ⟨C, hC_sq.symm⟩
  obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := this
  use x; rw [Nat.cast_pow, hk]; field_simp

let k := (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1)
  have hk : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (a * b + 1) := Nat.div_eq_of_dvd h₁
  have : (k : ℝ) = (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1) := by
    rw [hk, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_one]
    field_simp [nlinarith [h₀.1, h₀.2]]
  rw [← this]
  by_contra h_not_sq
  push_neg at h_not_sq
  let S := { s | ∃ a b, a + b = s ∧ 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∧ a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (a * b + 1) }
  have hS : S.Nonempty := ⟨a + b, a, b, rfl, h₀.1, h₀.2, hk⟩
  let s := Nat.find hS
  rcases Nat.find_spec hS with ⟨A, B, hsum, hA, hB, heq⟩
  wlog hAB : B ≤ A generalizing A B
  · apply this B A hsum.symm hB hA (by rwa [add_comm, mul_comm, add_comm (B^2)]) (le_of_not_le hAB)
  have h_k_pos : 0 < k := by
    refine Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (λ hk0 => ?_)
    rw [hk0, zero_mul] at heq
    linarith [pow_pos hA 2, pow_pos hB 2]
  let C : ℤ := (k : ℤ) * B - A
  have hC_eq : (C : ℤ) ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = k * (C * B + 1) := by
    simp only [C]; zify [heq] at *; ring_nf; rw [heq]; ring
  have hC_ge_0 : 0 ≤ C := by
    by_contra hC_neg
    have : A > (k : ℤ) * B := by linarith
    have : (A : ℤ) * (A - k * B) = k - B ^ 2 := by zify [heq] at *; linear_combination heq
    have : k - B ^ 2 < (A : ℤ) * (A - k * B) := by
      calc k - B ^ 2 < k := by linarith [sq_nonneg B]
           _ ≤ k * B := by apply le_mul_of_pos_right; exact Int.ofNat_pos.mpr hB
           _ < A := by linarith
           _ ≤ A * (A - k * B) := by apply le_mul_of_pos_right; linarith
    linarith
  lift C to ℕ using hC_ge_0
  have hC_pos : 0 < C := by
    by_contra hC0; simp [hC0] at hC_eq; rw [mul_one] at hC_eq
    exact h_not_sq ⟨B, hC_eq.symm⟩
  have hC_lt : C < A := by
    have : (A : ℤ) * C = B ^ 2 - k := by simp [C]; zify [heq] at *; linear_combination heq
    have : (A : ℤ) * C < A * A := by
      rw [this]
      calc (B : ℤ) ^ 2 - k < B ^ 2 := by linarith
           _ ≤ A ^ 2 := by zify; exact sq_le_sq (by linarith) (by linarith)
           _ = A * A := sq (A : ℤ)
    exact Int.lt_of_mul_lt_mul_left this (by zify; linarith)
  have h_sol : C + B ∈ S := ⟨C, B, rfl, hC_pos, hB, by zify at hC_eq ⊢; exact hC_eq⟩
  apply Nat.find_min hS (show C + B < s from by rw [← hsum]; linarith) h_sol

let k := (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1)
  have hk : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (a * b + 1) := Nat.div_eq_of_dvd h₁
  suffices ∃ x : ℕ, x ^ 2 = k by
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := this
    use x; rw [hx, hk]; field_simp [show (a : ℝ) * b + 1 ≠ 0 by positivity]
  by_contra h_not_sq
  let S := {p : ℕ × ℕ | 0 < p.1 ∧ 0 < p.2 ∧ p.1 ^ 2 + p.2 ^ 2 = k * (p.1 * p.2 + 1)}
  have hS : (a, b) ∈ S := ⟨h₀.1, h₀.2, hk⟩
  let f (p : ℕ × ℕ) := p.1 + p.2
  obtain ⟨p, hp, h_min⟩ := WellFounded.has_min (Nat.lt_wfRel.invImage f) S ⟨_, hS⟩
  wlog h_le : p.2 ≤ p.1 generalizing p
  · exact this p.swap ⟨hp.2.1, hp.1, by rw [add_comm, mul_comm, hp.2.2]⟩ (by rwa [add_comm]) 
      (fun q hq lt ↦ h_min q.swap hq (by rwa [add_comm])) (le_of_not_le h_le)
  have h_eq : (p.1 : ℤ) ^ 2 - k * p.1 * p.2 + p.2 ^ 2 - k = 0 := by zify [hp.2.2]; ring
  let x := (k : ℤ) * p.2 - p.1
  have h_root : x ^ 2 - k * p.2 * x + p.2 ^ 2 - k = 0 := by
    rw [sub_eq_zero] at h_eq ⊢
    linear_combination h_eq + (k * p.2 - p.1 - x) * (x + p.1 - k * p.2)
  have hx_prod : x * p.1 = p.2 ^ 2 - k := by
    linear_combination -h_eq + p.1 * (x + p.1 - k * p.2)
  have k_ge_1 : 1 ≤ (k : ℤ) := by
    zify; apply Nat.le_of_dvd (by positivity) h₁
  have hx_nonneg : 0 ≤ x := by
    by_contra h_neg; have : 1 ≤ (p.2 : ℤ) := by zify [hp.2.1]; exact hp.2.1
    nlinarith [h_root]
  have hx_pos : 0 < x := by
    refine lt_of_le_of_ne hx_nonneg fun h0 ↦ h_not_sq ⟨p.2, ?_⟩
    zify at h0; rw [h0, zero_mul, sub_eq_zero] at hx_prod
    exact mod_cast hx_prod.symm
  refine h_min (x.toNat, p.2) ⟨Int.toNat_pos_of_pos hx_pos, hp.2.1, ?_⟩ ?_
  · zify; rw [h_root]; ring
  · dsimp [f]; zify; rw [Int.toNat_of_nonneg hx_nonneg]
    apply lt_of_mul_lt_mul_right (b := p.1) _ (by zify [hp.1]; exact hp.1)
    rw [hx_prod]
    calc (p.2 : ℤ) ^ 2 - k < p.2 ^ 2 := by linarith
      _ ≤ p.1 ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ = p.1 * p.1 := sq _

let k := (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1)
  have hk : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (a * b + 1) := Nat.div_eq_of_dvd h₁
  have h_sq : ∃ x, x * x = k := by
    by_contra h_not_sq
    let S := { n | ∃ A B : ℕ, A + B = n ∧ 0 < A ∧ 0 < B ∧ A ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = k * (A * B + 1) }
    have h_nonempty : a + b ∈ S := ⟨a, b, rfl, h₀.1, h₀.2, hk⟩
    let s := Nat.find h_nonempty
    have hs := Nat.find_spec h_nonempty
    obtain ⟨A, B, h_sum, hA, hB, h_eqn, h_le⟩ : ∃ A B, A + B = s ∧ 0 < A ∧ 0 < B ∧ A ^ 2 + B ^ 2 = k * (A * B + 1) ∧ B ≤ A := by
      rcases hs with ⟨a', b', hsum, ha, hb, heq⟩
      by_cases h : b' ≤ a'
      · exact ⟨a', b', hsum, ha, hb, heq, h⟩
      · exact ⟨b', a', add_comm a' b' ▸ hsum, hb, ha, add_comm (a'^2) (b'^2) ▸ mul_comm a' b' ▸ heq, le_of_not_le h⟩
    have h_neq : A ≠ B := by
      rintro rfl
      have : k * (A * A + 1) = 2 * A ^ 2 := by rw [← h_eqn, two_mul]
      have : k < 2 := by
        rw [mul_comm] at this
        have : A * A + 1 > A ^ 2 := Nat.lt_succ_of_le (le_refl _)
        have : k = (2 * A ^ 2) / (A ^ 2 + 1) := by rw [this, Nat.mul_div_cancel _ (by linarith)]
        rw [this]; apply Nat.div_lt_of_lt_mul; linarith
      have : k = 1 := by
        apply Nat.eq_of_le_of_lt_succ _ this
        rw [Nat.one_le_div_iff (by linarith)]; exact h₁
      apply h_not_sq ⟨1, by rw [this, one_mul]⟩
    have h_lt : B < A := Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne h_le (Ne.symm h_neq)
    let C_int : ℤ := k * B - A
    have h_root : C_int ^ 2 - k * B * C_int + B ^ 2 - k = 0 := by
      zify at h_eqn; unfold C_int; linear_combination -1 * h_eqn
    have h_C_ge_0 : 0 ≤ C_int := by
      by_contra h_neg; push_neg at h_neg
      have : C_int ^ 2 - k * B * C_int + B ^ 2 - k > 0 := by
        have : (1 : ℤ) ≤ k := by zify; rw [Nat.one_le_div_iff (by linarith)]; exact h₁
        have : (1 : ℤ) ≤ B := by zify; exact hB
        nlinarith
      linarith
    lift C_int to ℕ using h_C_ge_0 with C
    by_cases hC0 : C = 0
    · have : k = B ^ 2 := by zify at h_root hC0; rw [hC0] at h_root; linarith
      exact h_not_sq ⟨B, this.symm⟩
    have hC_pos : 0 < C := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hC0
    have h_C_lt_A : C < A := by
      have : (C : ℤ) * A = B ^ 2 - k := by
        zify at h_eqn; unfold C_int; linear_combination -1 * h_eqn
      have : (C : ℤ) < A := by
        apply Int.lt_of_mul_lt_mul_right (a := A)
        · rw [this]; zify at hA hB h₁; nlinarith
        · zify; exact hA
      assumption
    have : C + B < s := by rw [← h_sum]; exact Nat.add_lt_add_right h_C_lt_A _
    apply Nat.not_mem_of_lt_min this (s := S) ⟨C, B, rfl, hC_pos, hB, by zify at h_root; zify; linear_combination h_root⟩
  rcases h_sq with ⟨x, rfl⟩; use x; norm_cast; rw [hk, mul_comm, Nat.mul_div_cancel _ (by linarith)]

let k := (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1)
  have hk : k * (a * b + 1) = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 := Nat.div_mul_cancel h₁
  have h_sq : ∃ x, x ^ 2 = k := by
    suffices ∀ n a b, a + b = n → 0 < a → 0 < b → k * (a * b + 1) = a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 → ∃ x, x ^ 2 = k by
      exact this (a + b) a b rfl h₀.1 h₀.2 hk.symm
    intro n
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with n IH
    intro a b hn ha hb h
    by_cases h_ab : a < b
    · apply IH (b + a) (by linarith) b a (by linarith) hb ha
      rwa [add_comm, mul_comm, add_comm b]
    · have hab : b ≤ a := Nat.le_of_not_lt h_ab
      by_cases hab_eq : a = b
      · subst hab_eq
        have : a * a + 1 ∣ 2 * a * a := by rw [← h]; exact dvd_mul_right _ _
        have : a * a + 1 ∣ 2 := by
          convert Nat.dvd_sub_mul_left (a * a + 1) a 2 this using 1
          ring
        have : a = 1 := by
          have := Nat.le_of_dvd two_pos this
          nlinarith
        subst this
        use 1
        simp [k] at h ⊢
        exact h.symm
      · have hab_lt : b < a := lt_of_le_of_ne hab (Ne.symm hab_eq)
        let c_int : ℤ := (k : ℤ) * b - a
        have hc_eq : c_int ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (c_int * b + 1) := by
          zify at h ⊢; simp [c_int]; nlinarith
        have hc_pos : 0 ≤ c_int := by
          by_contra! hc_neg
          have k_gt_b2 : k > b ^ 2 := by zify at h; nlinarith
          have k_lt_a : k < a := by
            by_contra!
            have : k * (a * b + 1) ≥ a * (a * b + 1) := by nlinarith
            rw [h] at this
            have : a ^ 2 * (b - 1) + a ≤ b ^ 2 := by nlinarith
            cases b with | zero => contradiction | succ b =>
              cases b with | zero => simp at this; subst this; simp at hab_lt; contradiction
              | succ b => nlinarith
          have : -c_int * a = k - b ^ 2 := by zify at h; nlinarith
          have : -c_int * a < a := by linarith
          have : -c_int = 0 := by
            have : -c_int < 1 := Nat.div_lt_of_lt_mul (by rwa [one_mul])
            linarith
          linarith
        lift c_int to ℕ using hc_pos with c
        if hc0 : c = 0 then
          subst c
          simp at hc_eq
          use b
          zify at hc_eq
          exact hc_eq
        else
          have c_lt_a : c < a := by zify at h; nlinarith
          apply IH (c + b) (by linarith) c b rfl (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hc0) hb
          zify; exact hc_eq
  rcases h_sq with ⟨x, hx⟩
  use x
  norm_cast
  rw [hx, Nat.cast_div h₁ (by nlinarith)]
